prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `e133d23d`.
codex_response:
The rule is: split the `3x7` input into left `3x3`, separator column, and right `3x3`; discard the separator; overlay the two side blocks cellwise; recolor every occupied cell to `2`. The verifier does that directly in [verifier.py:4](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_e133d23d/verifier.py#L4), and the generator in [generator.py:9](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_e133d23d/generator.py#L9) samples left/right occupancies plus overlap under the same fixed `6 | 4 | 8` layout so the outputs stay in-family. No new primitive was needed.

I used the Opus hint as a starting hypothesis. The Sonnet hint had one incorrect detail about the separator column, so I recorded that correction in [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_e133d23d/notes.md). Package files are [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_e133d23d/__init__.py), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_e133d23d/verifier.py), [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_e133d23d/generator.py), and [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_e133d23d/notes.md).

Verification/build results: official verifier `6/6` passed, generated verifier `1000/1000` passed. Artifacts are [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/e133d23d/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/e133d23d/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/e133d23d/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/e133d23d/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/e133d23d/previews/preview_03.png). I also opened `preview_01.png` and the sheet structure looked consistent with the official task family.
